name: Honeyed Ginger & Honeyed Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat honey in a saucepan over low heat until just beginning to boil.
2. Pour the warm honey over the thinly sliced ginger or garlic.
3. Allow the mixture to cool and infuse for 3 weeks before consuming.
It takes 3 weeks until it's ready to eat. Sounds great to me.
